objective: Expand the Tushare daily-only raw stock daily harvest after V3.38 passed quality checks, while preserving permission-blocked interface records.
forbidden_actions: Do not call endpoints other than tushare.daily.
Do not run adjusted-return, valuation, PIT constituent, factor, or portfolio research.
Do not delete existing daily files; use cache/resume only.
Do not remove the manual interface queue.
acceptance: At most 300 new trade-date API calls are attempted.
The manual data interface queue remains available and unchanged in meaning.
All acquired dates pass duplicate and OHLCV quality checks or are explicitly reported.
The run produces an expansion summary with coverage, row counts, error counts, and remaining queued dates.
